labels.name: description
labels.value: Kubernetes operator that manages SWGI operand deployment, scaling, lifecycle, and configuration.

labels.name: io.k8s.description
labels.value: Python 3.11 available as container is a base platform for building and running various Python 3.11 applications and frameworks. Python is an easy to learn, powerful programming language. It has efficient high-level data structures and a simple but effective approach to object-oriented programming. Python's elegant syntax and dynamic typing, together with its interpreted nature, make it an ideal language for scripting and rapid application development in many areas on most platforms.
